shopping_424.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The agent failed to identify the absolute cheapest anime poster because it only scanned the first page of search results. The objective requires finding "the cheapest" poster, which implies checking all available options across all pagination pages to ensure the minimum price is found. The agent added an anime poster that was the cheapest *on the visible page*, but not necessarily the cheapest overall.
shopping_424.REFLECTION:
When the objective requires finding the "cheapest" item from a category with multiple search result pages, the agent must iterate through all pagination links to collect all relevant item prices before making a selection. A robust strategy would involve:
1.  Filtering or identifying items that match the "anime poster" criteria on each page.
2.  Extracting the price for each identified item.
3.  Navigating to subsequent pages using pagination controls (e.g., "next" button or page numbers).
4.  After collecting all relevant items and their prices from all pages, compare them to find the absolute minimum price.
5.  Add the item corresponding to the minimum price to the cart.
